title: Give me that research kit!
description: A datapack that makes you (and your friends) spawn with a research kit.
body:
This datapack adds a bundle that you get on spawning in the world, containing
- an iron sword
- an iron axe
- an iron pickaxe
- a spyglass
- 16 cooked beef
- a lantern
- 16 torches
- and a book and quil

![Inventory with a bundle with some items in it in the first slot of the hotbar.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73c4a03003856dbf31f81ba341450349f699ce15_0.webp)

It's nothing too special, but it enables you to directly go out and explore, like a real researcher. You will still need to get resources but with iron gear that won't take too long.

If you would like to use this in a modpack feel free, but refer to this page. ~~(so that they knnow from who they got that nice bundle😉)~~

_A datapack by Lxaur_
